 "To Begin Again"
Written by Ingrid Michaelson, Sarah Aarons and Zayn Malik
 
When the world was ending

And we talked about the places weвАЩd never been
When the world was ending

Another day
To begin again, to begin again, to begin again

But I know that I will try
To begin again, to begin again, to begin
To live and love and breathe again

en.title: Cape Horn, the most dangerous sea passage on Earth
en.description:
Cape Horn is in the extreme south of America. It is estimated that there were about 800 shipwrecks there and that 10,000 people lost their lives while trying to unite the Pacific and Atlantic oceans.

In this video we propose to discover why it is a unique place. We will also know some surprising peculiarities of the indigenous people who inhabited the area.

snippet.description:

This fifteen minute special brings fans directly into JustinвАЩs world and opens the doors to his powerful new album.

snippet.title: Ricardo Montaner, Juan Luis Guerra 4.40 - Dios As√≠ Lo Quiso
snippet.description:
Dios As√≠ Lo Quiso рЯТНрЯСЂ
Ricardo Montaner y Juan Luis Guerra (Video Oficial)
--
Dios as√≠ lo quiso la hicimos en el estudio, est√°bamos reunidos los hermanos David y Jonathan Julca, Camilo Echeverri, Yasmil Marrufo y yo, y empez√≥ a surgir algo que no tenia ni un porqu√©, ni la ten√≠amos muy clara de lo que est√°bamos buscando. Sab√≠amos que lo que yo quer√≠a era una canci√≥n de amor de pareja siguiendo los fundamentos de este √°lbum dedicado al amor, del sentimiento profundo que una persona puede tener por su pareja. вАЬDios as√≠ lo quisoвАЭ es una canci√≥n de amor, que con el correr del tiempo fue tomando esta cadencia como de cumbia que me llevaba si o si al Caribe. Una vez que le mont√© la voz todos me dec√≠an: esta canci√≥n a d√Їo  con Juan Luis ser√≠a espectacular.

¬њPorqu√© Juan Luis? 
Primero porque soy un fan de toda la m√Їsica de Juan Luis. Lo conozco de hace mucho y es un hermano que mi familia y yo queremos mucho. Por otro lado, √©l ha hecho una espectacular carrera y su legado musical va a ser eterno. Siempre, siempre, la gente me ha comentado: ¬њpara cu√°ndo una canci√≥n con Juan Luis? Yo lo recib√≠a como un ¬њqui√©n sabe?, ¬њcu√°ndo podr√° ser? o lo recib√≠a como: ¬°alg√Їn d√≠a tendr√© una canci√≥n apropiada para hacer con √©l! Pero cuando le mont√© la voz a esta canci√≥n me tom√© el atrevimiento de escribirle, le mostr√© el tema y le dije que so√±aba con poder  hacerla con √©l. Juan Luis no me dej√≥ terminar, literalmente, no me dej√≥ terminar. Me dijo que estaba encantado con la canci√≥n y por supuesto me dijo que s√≠. De ah√≠ en adelante todo transcurri√≥ de maravilla, hasta que Juan Luis mont√≥ voces, me la envi√≥ e hicimos esta edici√≥n de los dos. En tiempo de pandemia fue imposible juntarnos. Pero creo que el resultado es m√°s que obvio. Es una hermos√≠sima canci√≥n de amor que espero toque el coraz√≥n a todo el mundo.
вАФ

snippet.description:
Official lyric video for вАЬYou Belong With MeвАЭ (TaylorвАЩs Version) вАУ off her Fearless (TaylorвАЩs Version) album. Get the album here: https://taylor.lnk.to/fearlesstaylorsversion.

Official Lyrics:
 
YouвАЩre on the phone with your girlfriend 
SheвАЩs upset, sheвАЩs going off about something that you said 
Cause she doesnвАЩt get your humor like I do 

IвАЩm in my room itвАЩs a typical Tuesday night
IвАЩm listening to the kind of music she doesnвАЩt like 
And sheвАЩll never know your story like I do 

Cause she wears short skirts, I wear t-shirts 
SheвАЩs cheer captain and IвАЩm on the bleachers 
Dreaming вАШbout the day when you wake up and find 
That what youвАЩre looking for has been here the whole time 

If you could see that IвАЩm the one who understands you 
Been here all along so why canвАЩt you see 
You belong with me
 You belong with me 

Walk in the streets with you in your worn out jeans 
I canвАЩt help thinking this is how it ought to be 
Laughing on a park bench thinking to myself, hey isnвАЩt this easy 

And youвАЩve got a smile that could light up this whole town 
I havenвАЩt seen it in a while since she brought you down 
You say youвАЩre fine I know you better than that 
Hey what you doing with a girl like that 

She wears high heels, I wear sneakers 
SheвАЩs cheer captain and IвАЩm on the bleachers 
Dreaming вАШbout the day when you wake up and find 
That what youвАЩre looking for has been here the whole time 

If you could see that IвАЩm the one who understands you 
Been here all along so why canвАЩt you see 
You belong with me 
Standing by waiting at your back door 
All this time how could you not know baby 
You belong with me 
You belong with me 

Oh I remember you driving to my house in the middle of the night 
IвАЩm the one who makes you laugh when you know youвАЩre вАШbout to cry 
I know your favorite songs and you tell me about your dreams 
I think I know where you belong, I think I know itвАЩs with me 

CanвАЩt you see that IвАЩm the one who understands you 
Been here all along so why canвАЩt you see 
You belong with me 
Standing by waiting at your back door 
All this time how could you not know baby 
You belong with me 
You belong with me 
You belong with me 
Have you ever thought just maybe 
You belong with me 
You belong with me

Twenty One Pilots official video for "Shy Away" from the forthcoming album Scaled And Icy, available May 21st on Fueled By Ramen.

LYRICS
When I get home,
You better not be there
We're placing bets you won't
Shed your modesty
And the only thing to leave behind
Is your own skin on the floor

Don't you shy away
Manifest a ceiling when you shy away
Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard
Don't you shh...

You barely recognize the pictures they
put in a frame
'Cause you shed your modesty
Don't circle the track
Take what you have
and leave your skin on the floor.

Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard

Boy, you better not be there
You're long gone
Shed your modesty
Don't circle the track
Just break the cycle in half
and leave your skin on the floor.

Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard

that's never heard...

an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard

Don't you shy away.

snippet.title: Brawl Stars Animation - The #GoldarmGang Heist
snippet.description:
Download NOW!! вЦЇвЦЇ https://supr.cl/playbrawl
Be a BRAWLER! Subscribe! вЦЇвЦЇ https://supr.cl/subscribe

#GoldarmGang #Brawlstars #Belle

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but donвАЩt let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your teamвАЩs safe and try to crack open your opponentsвАЩ. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove youвАЩre the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

snippet.title: Space Jam: Una Nueva Era - Trailer 1
snippet.description:
¬°Bienvenidos al partido del siglo! El campe√≥n de la NBA e √≠cono mundial LeBron James se embarca en una aventura √©pica junto a Bugs Bunny con el evento animado / de acci√≥n en vivo "Space Jam: Una Nueva EraвАЭ, del director Malcolm D. Lee y un equipo de cine innovador que incluye a Ryan Coogler y Maverick Carter. Este viaje de transformaci√≥n es una combinaci√≥n man√≠aca de dos mundos que revela hasta d√≥nde llegar√°n algunos padres para conectarse con sus hijos. Cuando LeBron y su peque√±o hijo Dom quedan atrapados en un espacio digital por una IA deshonesta, LeBron debe llevarlos a casa a salvo liderando a Bugs, Lola Bunny y toda la pandilla de Looney Tunes notoriamente indisciplinados a la victoria sobre los campeones digitalizados de la IA en el cancha: una lista mejorada de estrellas profesionales del baloncesto como nunca antes las hab√≠as visto. Son Tunes versus Goons en el desaf√≠o m√°s importante de su vida, que redefinir√° el v√≠nculo de LeBron con su hijo y arrojar√° luz sobre el poder de ser uno mismo. Las melod√≠as listas para la acci√≥n destruyen las convenciones, potencian sus talentos √Їnicos y sorprenden incluso al "Rey" James jugando el juego a su manera.

James protagoniza junto al nominado al Oscar Don Cheadle (las pel√≠culas de "Los Vengadores", "Hotel Rwanda"), Khris Davis ("Judas y el Mes√≠as Negro", la serie de televisi√≥n "Atlanta"), Sonequa Martin-Green (la serie de televisi√≥n "The Walking Dead", " Star Trek: Discovery вАЭ), el nuevo talento Cedric Joe, Jeff Bergman (вАЬ Looney Tunes Cartoons вАЭ) y Eric Bauza (вАЬ Looney Tunes Cartoons вАЭ).

Lee (вАЬViaje de ChicasвАЭ, вАЬNight SchoolвАЭ) dirige a partir de un gui√≥n de Juel Taylor, Tony Rettenmaier, Keenan Coogler y Terence Nance. Los productores de la pel√≠cula son Ryan Coogler, LeBron James, Maverick Carter y Duncan Henderson, y los productores ejecutivos son Sev Ohanian, Zinzi Coogler, Allison Abbate, Jesse Ehrman, Jamal Henderson, Spencer Beighley, Justin Lin, Terence Nance e Ivan Reitman.

El equipo creativo detr√°s de escena del director incluye al director de fotograf√≠a Salvatore Totino ("Spider-Man: De Regreso a CasaвАЭ), el productor de animaci√≥n Troy Nethercott (вАЬParque M√°gicoвАЭ), los dise√±adores de producci√≥n Kevin Ishioka (вАЬLa MulaвАЭ), Akin McKenzie ( вАЬAs√≠ nos venвАЭ de Netflix) y Clint Wallace (pr√≥ximamente "Eternals"), el editor Bob Ducsay (вАЬGodzilla II: El Rey de los MonstruosвАЭ, вАЬLa Guerra de las Galaxias, episodio VIII: los √Їltimos JediвАЭ)  y la dise√±adora de vestuario Melissa Bruning  (вАЬRampage: devastaci√≥nвАЭ). La m√Їsica es de Kris Bowers (вАЬGreen Book: una amistad sin fronterasвАЭ y la serie вАЬBridgertonвАЭ).

Warner Bros. Pictures presenta una producci√≥n de Proximity / The SpringHill Company, una pel√≠cula de Malcolm D. Lee, "Space Jam: Una Nueva EraвАЭ. La pel√≠cula ser√° distribuida mundialmente por Warner Bros. Pictures. Pr√≥ximamente - Solo en Cines.

snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! рЯСА


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter вЦЇ https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram вЦЇhttps://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook вЦЇhttps://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-¬≠filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

ParentвАЩs Guide:
http://www.supercell.net/parents
